name: Tremelimumab
description: Tremelimumab is under investigation for the treatment of Mesothelioma, Liver Cancer, Liver Neoplasms, Liver Cell Caricinoma, and HepatoCellular Carcinoma. Tremelimumab has been investigated in Part C: Malignant Mesothelioma and Part A and B: Advanced Solid Malignancies.

interactions.name: Trastuzumab
interactions.description: Trastuzumab may increase the cardiotoxic activities of Tremelimumab.

interactions.name: Varicella Zoster Vaccine (Live/Attenuated)
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Varicella Zoster Vaccine (Live/Attenuated) can be decreased when used in combination with Tremelimumab.

interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Yellow fever vaccine can be decreased when used in combination with Tremelimumab.
